[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows part of the phrase “admin jahat” in large black text on a white background alongside a yellow crying face emoji on the right.

Main Subject:
The main focus is the large black text “admin jahat,” cropped so only those words are clearly visible, with a small yellow emoji face to the right that has wide eyes and a worried, crying expression.

Setting:
The scene is a plain, digital graphic with a white background; no physical setting is shown, and lighting or weather is not applicable.

Visual Details:
The text is bold, black, and sans-serif, positioned on the left side of the image and cut off near the top and left edges. The emoji is circular, yellow, and positioned toward the upper-right area, with detailed facial features: two large white eyes with dark pupils and a small downturned mouth, plus small blue tear shapes near the lower sides of the face. The overall layout is minimal with strong contrast between black text and the white background.

Visible Text:
admin jahat

Practical Summary:
A simple white graphic displays the cropped phrase “admin jahat” in large black letters. On the right, a yellow crying/worried face emoji appears.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
